title: Gmail Automations within Templates
excerpt:

posts.author: pink2013 (Stephanie Cassimatis)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use custom automations that include integrations with Gmail.

When we create templates with automation, these automations within the template are not coming over to any new board created from that template due to them using Gmail.

Please allow this as we have several processes where we need this to function but now creates hours of additional work.
